title: Connected World 16x
description: A pack that adds lots of connected textures for default Minecraft
body: This pack adds connected textures for lots of different blocks, making the transition between them a lot smoother.   Attention! This pack requires Optifine for Vanilla/Forge users or Continuity for Fabric users! This pack also may cause chunk update lags! To reduce lags, recommend to set "Connected textures" setting to Fast.     Video Showcase:     Anybody is free to use this pack anywhere. Just do not rename the pack, please.   If you have any questions or you want to support what I do:   Check out my YouTube channel Check out my Twitch channel Check out my VK page Check out my Telegram
